    47	## 1. Executive Summary
    48	
    49	### 1.1 Mission
    50	
    51	**KurvPay EDP (Enterprise Data Platform)** replaces a legacy T-SQL TSYS parsing stack with a modern Python pipeline. The lift consists of two layers stitched together by S3:
    52	
    53	1. **AWS Lambda parsers** (Python 3.12, one Lambda per TSYS file family) decode fixed-width / XML TSYS files into typed Apache Parquet on S3.
    54	2. **Databricks Lakeflow** (Delta Live Tables, Unity Catalog) ingests those Parquet files via Auto Loader and lands them in a Medallion architecture — Bronze (raw), Silver (typed + quality-gated), Gold (business OBT views).
    55

   244	### 2.4 Source vs. Deployment Boundary (Architectural Rule)
   245	
   246	- `src/` is the **only canonical source** for development and testing.
   247	- `functions/` is a **deployment artefact** — never edit `functions/*/src/` directly.
   248	- [scripts/build-copy-src.sh](../scripts/build-copy-src.sh) is the promotion gate. It copies `src/core/` → `functions/<type>/src/`, rewrites `src.core.*` imports to `src.*`, and auto-generates each `__init__.py` via Python AST introspection (no hardcoded heredocs — resolved 2026-03-29 per backlog item #8).
   249	- Both `src/core/handlers/` and `functions/*/handler.py` are unified — handlers read **environment variables** for config (no `config.yaml`).
   250	
   251	Rule: [.claude/rules/architecture.md](../.claude/rules/architecture.md). Build script: [scripts/build-copy-src.sh](../scripts/build-copy-src.sh) (G-01 documents 4 hardcoded case-blocks per type that need a data-driven map).
   252	
   253	### 2.5 AWS Lambda Layer
   254	
   255	- **Runtime:** Python 3.12.
   256	- **Trigger:** S3 ObjectCreated on `kurv-edp-use1-dev-landing/<type>/`.
   257	- **Output:** Parquet to `kurv-edp-use1-dev-stage/<type>/<table>/<file_stem>.parquet` (per L-13: `parquet_path.parent.name/` preserves writer subdirs).
   258	- **Retry policy:** `botocore.config.Config(retries={"max_attempts": 3, "mode": "adaptive"})` (S3 adaptive retry).
   259	- **Error handling:** `type(e).__name__` (no internal path leakage); re-raise on total failure for DLQ delivery.
   260	- **Per-file metrics:** `ParsingStats` (total_lines, records_yielded, skip_reasons) on `ParsingContext`.
   261	
   262	Reference: [docs/aws-lambda-functions.md](aws-lambda-functions.md), [.claude/rules/code-quality.md](../.claude/rules/code-quality.md), [CLAUDE.md](../CLAUDE.md) lines 47-54.
   263	
   264	### 2.6 Databricks Lakeflow Layer
   265	
   266	- **Bundle root:** [pipelines/databricks.yml](../pipelines/databricks.yml). Resources: [pipelines/resources/](../pipelines/resources/) (8 YAMLs — 7 type pipelines + 1 orchestration job).
   267	- **Authoring style mix:**
   268	  - **Schemaless Silver** (`CREATE STREAMING TABLE name AS SELECT ...`) — used for ACH, MS, ADF, MDI, TDDF, D256 (no predeclared columns; CONSTRAINTs only).
   269	  - **Predeclared Silver** (`CREATE OR REFRESH STREAMING TABLE name (col1 TYPE, ...)`) — PPM (needed for `hid BIGINT GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY`). This pattern brings strictness — see L-26.
   270	- **Auto Loader:** `cloud_files(${stage_bucket}/<type>/<table>/, "parquet", ...)` with `schemaEvolutionMode => "addNewColumns"`.
   271	- **Quality:** Each Silver table has a companion `<name>_quarantine` streaming table with a `_violation_reason` CASE column.
   272	- **MDI special case:** dual-table architecture (`mdi_merchant_current` always-on + `mdi_merchant_monthly` only on monthly files). Bronze MDI carries a `_file_frequency` column derived from filename pattern matching.
   273	- **Merchant Statements special case:** XML — Bronze preserves `xml_raw`, Silver shreds via `xpath_string()` and applies `CONCAT('****', RIGHT(..., 4))` masking on `DEPOSIT_ACCT_NUM` / `ROUTING_NUM`.
   274	- **Configuration injection:** Pipeline YAML `configuration:` block injects `${stage_bucket}` and `${catalog}` into SQL.
   275	- **Photon + serverless:** `serverless: true` is mutually exclusive with a `clusters:` block; all 7 type pipelines use serverless + photon (verified [pipelines/resources/ach_pipeline.yml](../pipelines/resources/ach_pipeline.yml) lines 7-10).
   276	- **Catalog hyphen rule:** Catalogs with hyphens (e.g. `kurv-edp-use1-dev`) MUST be backtick-quoted: `` `${catalog}` ``.
   277	
   278	Reference: [docs/databricks-lakeflow-pipelines.md](databricks-lakeflow-pipelines.md), [.claude/rules/lakeflow.md](../.claude/rules/lakeflow.md).

   652	## 4. Parser Translation Notes (T-SQL → Python)
   653	
   654	### 4.1 Translation Rule Set
   655	
   656	The Python rewrite follows three deterministic rules when translating T-SQL `INSERT INTO ... SUBSTRING(data, N, L)` blocks into parser code:
   657	
   658	1. **Index conversion (L-15):** SQL is 1-indexed; Python is 0-indexed. `SUBSTRING(data, N, L)` becomes `data[N-1 : N-1+L]`. This is **the** parsing bug — every onboarding has hit it. A `substring_slice(s, sql_pos, sql_len)` helper is pending promotion to canonical (G-04).
   659	2. **Type coercion:** All amounts use `Decimal` (never `float`) per [.claude/rules/code-quality.md](../.claude/rules/code-quality.md). Shared coercion helpers live in [src/core/utils/conversions.py](../src/core/utils/conversions.py).
   660	3. **Dataclass pattern:** Every record is a `@dataclass(frozen=True)`; parsers yield `Iterator[Record]`; writers consume those generators and serialise to Parquet via PyArrow.
   661	
   662	### 4.2 Audit Evidence

   665	- [docs/audit/2026-03-31-adf-proc-old-vs-new.md](audit/2026-03-31-adf-proc-old-vs-new.md) — proc schema evolution: 5 removed tables, FK rebinding, TH01 stripped from 19 → 6 columns.

   698	## 5. PII / Compliance
   699	
   700	### 5.1 Ratified Architecture (Phase 2 ADR)
   701	
   702	The **2026-04-18 on-site** ratified the canonical PII policy. **The EDP parser layer does NOT mask any PII field.** All TSYS file records — including full PANs, bank account numbers, SSNs, Tax IDs, driver's licenses, and passenger/renter names — are ingested **raw** into Bronze Parquet and Bronze Delta tables. **Column-level security is enforced at the Databricks Unity Catalog RBAC layer** via dynamic views in Silver/Gold.
   703	
   704	Source: [docs/adrs/adr-pii-masking-policy.md](adrs/adr-pii-masking-policy.md).
   705	
   706	### 5.2 Architecture Diagram
   707	
   708	```text
   709	+---------------+    +-----------+    +---------------+    +----------------------+
   710	|  TSYS SFTP    |--->|  S3 raw   |--->|  Lambda parse |--->|  S3 -stage (Parquet) |
   711	|  (scrubbed at |    |  (as-is)  |    |  (no mask)    |    |  Raw PII + raw PAN   |
   712	|   source)     |    +-----------+    +---------------+    +----------+-----------+
   713	+---------------+                                                     |
   714	                                                                      v
   715	                              +---------------------------------------------------+
   716	                              |  Databricks Bronze (Unity Catalog)                |
   717	                              |  • Tables carry raw values                        |
   718	                              |  • Access restricted to ingestion service         |
   719	                              +-------------------------+-------------------------+
   720	                                                        |
   721	                                                        v
   722	                +-----------------------------------------------------------------+
   723	                |  Silver/Gold Dynamic Views (RBAC-governed)                      |
   724	                |  CASE WHEN is_member('pii_reader') THEN pan ELSE mask_pan(pan)  |
   725	                |  • One policy, one source of truth                              |
   726	                |  • Role-aware (analyst vs finance vs auditor)                   |
   727	                +-----------------------------------------------------------------+
   728	```
   729	
   730	Diagram from [docs/adrs/adr-pii-masking-policy.md](adrs/adr-pii-masking-policy.md) lines 29-50.
   731	
   732	### 5.3 Rules
   733	
   734	1. **Models:** No `to_dict()` override applies `mask_pan()`. The utility [src/core/utils/pii.py](../src/core/utils/pii.py) `mask_pan()` remains for Silver/Gold use, but is NOT wired into any write path.
   735	2. **Writers:** Emit `source_dict` values as-returned by `Record.to_dict()`. No writer-level masking pass.
   736	3. **Parsers:** No PII-specific transformation. Strip, coerce types, propagate.
   737	4. **Schemas:** PyArrow field names match raw semantics (`pan`, `ext_pan`, `checking_account_number`) — no `_masked` suffix.
   738	5. **Silver/Gold:** Masking, redaction, and role-based access live in DLT-generated views or Unity Catalog dynamic views. The Databricks platform team owns these policies.
   739

   753	### 5.5 Companion Security Audit
   754	
   755	[docs/audit/2026-04-01-security-dkuppela.md](audit/2026-04-01-security-dkuppela.md) (D. Kuppela, cherry-pick reference per the SOW backlog (deprecated) line 80) confirms the Phase 2 ADR aligns with the broader security posture.
   756	
   757	### 5.6 Compliance Posture
   758	
   759	- **PCI DSS:** Raw PANs at rest in Bronze are permissible when the storage tier is inside a PCI-scoped environment with documented access controls. Unity Catalog dynamic views provide the role-based redaction required for non-privileged query paths.
   760	- **Data residency:** No change — values never leave the VPC/workspace boundary.
   761	- **Audit trail:** Unity Catalog captures every query against Silver/Gold views, including `is_member()` evaluation, giving a single audit surface.

   973	### 7.4 PII ADR + Phase 8 Identity Contracts
   974	
   975	Two project-wide invariants are enforced in every file type's model tests:
   976	
   977	- **PII ADR compliance** — `to_dict()` must NOT mask PAN/SSN/TaxID (per [adr-pii-masking-policy.md](adrs/adr-pii-masking-policy.md); Bronze stores raw, redaction is at the Databricks RBAC layer). Tests assert the raw value passes through unmodified.
   978	- **Phase 8 identity** — each record carries `file_uuid` + `record_seq` and NOT an integer `hid` (per [adr-record-id-preservation.md](adrs/adr-record-id-preservation.md); Silver materializes `hid` via `GENERATED ALWAYS AS IDENTITY`).
   979	
   980	These are written as plain inline assertions in each type's `tests/unit/models/test_{type}_models.py`. A shared-helpers module (`tests/shared/phase_contracts.py`) was tried but removed 2026-05-21 — it stayed unimported across all 7 types, so the abstraction never paid for itself (supersedes L-08; the contracts themselves are unchanged).
